title: LasyMasy
description: A Optimized Version of Minecraft with some QoL Mods, made for the LasyMasy Server
body:
# 🌿 LasyMasy Modpack

*The **LasyMasy Modpack** is designed to make Minecraft smoother, prettier, and more convenient — all without changing core gameplay. Originally made for the LasyMasy SMP server, it works on any vanilla server and is completely client-side only.*

---

## 🎯 What is this?

The **LasyMasy Modpack** improves the Minecraft experience with **better FPS**, **clean visuals**, and **handy QoL features** – all without changing the core gameplay.  
It’s perfect for use on **vanilla multiplayer servers**, since **all mods are client-side only**.

Whether you're building, exploring, or just want smoother gameplay, LasyMasy has your back.

---

## 🚀 Features

### ✅ Performance Enhancements
- **Sodium**, **Lithium**, **FerriteCore**, **ImmediatelyFast** – major FPS and memory boosts
- **C2ME**, **ThreadTweak**, **FastIpping** – multithreading and worldgen improvements
- **Dynamic FPS** – saves power when Minecraft is unfocused

### 👀 Visual & Shader Improvements
- **BetterGrass**, **BetterLeaves**, **Falling Leaves**, **SkinLayers3D**
- **Iris Shaders** – works seamlessly with Sodium
- **Entity Model & Texture Features**, **CullLeaves**, **Dark Loading Screen**

### 🛠️ Quality of Life Tweaks
- **Xaero’s Minimap + World Map** – maps with waypoints
- **Visual Workbench** – see what's inside crafting tables
- **Inventory Profiles Next**, **ClientSort**, **Inventory HUD+**
- **Jade** – block and entity info on hover
- **Controlling**, **Language Reload**, **MoreChatHistory**

### 🧩 Utility Mods
- **Freecam**, **CraftPresence**, **Shulker Box Tooltip**, **Villager Trading Plus**
- **Voice Chat** – proximity voice support
- **Mod Menu**, **Default Options**, **Debugify**, and more!

---

## 🧪 Technical Info

- ✅ **Client-side only** – does not require server installation
- 📦 ~200 curated mods focused on performance and usability

## 🔗 Why Choose LasyMasy?

- Great FPS, even on lower-end systems  
- Beautiful visuals that stay true to Minecraft  
- Better navigation, inventory, chat, and more  
- Works out of the box – no config required  
- Ideal for LasyMasy SMP or any vanilla server

---

Enjoy your enhanced Minecraft experience ✨  
Feedback and suggestions are always welcome!
